title: Another Deep Dark Soundtrack (End Shrine)
description: This is a resource pack that replaces the soundtrack "Ancestry" (by Lena Raine) to a soundtrack from Minecraft Dungeons with the soundtrack "End Shrine" (by Peter Hont).
body:
This is a resource pack replaces the soundtrack "Ancestry" (by Lena Raine) soundtrack wich is the original soundtrack used in Minecraft, and replaced with the Minecraft Dungeons: Echoing Void with the soundtrack "End Shrine" (by Peter Hont).

If you remember well, during Minecraft Live 2021, the Deep Dark biome was fully showcased, when the Warden was showcased it had this background music playing. I never found anyone doing this before, and I thought it could make more intense and terrefying the music when the Warden emerged in the Deep Dark, bringing that same feeling we had when we saw the progress of the Warden for the second time. :D

(I do not own this soundtrack, all copyrights belongs to Mojang. I only did this for fun and entretainment.)
